issues.detail: The instructions lack explicit error handling for missing files, GPU errors, or invalid hash modes.
The skill assumes Linux file paths and tools, limiting portability to other operating systems.

scenarios.name: Crack NTLM dump from authorized AD engagement
scenarios.rationale: Baseline picks the right mode but defaults to brute force and skips engagement isolation; treatment uses -r best64.rule, -w 3, isolated --potfile-path and --session for resume, and --show/--left for follow-up.

scenarios.name: Crack WPA2 handshake captured from own router
scenarios.rationale: Baseline calls deprecated -m 2500 / hccapx flow; treatment uses hcxpcapngtool to produce hc22000, runs current -m 22000 with rules and --session as the skill documents.
